message:
feat(c_interop): Achieve 100% CPython C API coverage

Add 393 missing CPython C API symbols to misc_functions.zig:

- PyBuffer release functions (2)
- PyBytesWriter (7 functions)
- PyCode/PyCompile functions (16)
- PyConfig functions (10)
- PyCrossInterpreterData (12)
- PyDict additional functions (18)
- PyErr additional functions (11)
- PyFrame/PyFunction functions (12)
- PyGen functions (5)
- PyImport additional (8)
- PyInterpreterState functions (22)
- PyMarshal functions (8)
- PyMutex/PyRWMutex/PySemaphore (11)
- PyObject additional functions (14)
- PyThread/PyThreadState functions (18)
- PyType watcher functions (6)
- PyUnicode additional (46)
- PyUnstable functions (18)
- PyXI cross-interpreter functions (18)
- Various type objects and global variables

Coverage: 1,664/1,664 CPython symbols (100%)
Exports: 2,443 total symbols
